English: Welcome to Eco, citizen.\n\nAround you is a living ecosystem, rich with plants, animals, and natural resources.  Let's take a look around.
French: Bienvenue dans Eco, citoyen.\n\nAutour de vous vit un écosystème riche en plantes, en animaux et en ressources naturelles. Jetons un coup d’œil aux alentours.
Spanish: Bienvenido a Eco, ciudadano.\n\nAlrededor tuyo hay un ecosistema vivo, rico en plantas, animales, y recursos naturales. Vamos a echar un vistazo.
German: Willkommen bei Eco, Mitbürger.\n\nDich umgibt ein lebendes Ökosystem, reich an Pflanzen, Tieren und natürlichen Ressourcen. Sehen wir uns mal um.
Korean: 안녕하세요. Eco에 오신 걸 환영합니다.\n\n 당신 주변은 살아있는 생태계로서, 다양한 식물, 동물, 그리고 자원 등이 풍부하게 자리 잡고 있습니다. 돌아다니면서 구경해보시죠.
BrazillianPortuguese: Bem-vindo ao Eco, cidadão!\n\nAo seu redor está um ecossistema vivo, rico em plantas, animais e recursos naturais. Vamos dar uma olhada a volta.
SimplifedChinese: 欢迎来到《生态物语》，公民。\n\n你正处在于一个生机盎然的生态中，这里有着各种各样的动植物和自然资源。让我们到四处看看。
Russian: Добро пожаловать в Eco, житель!\n\nТебя окружает живая экосистема с богатой флорой, фауной и природными ресурсами. Время осмотреться вокруг.
Italian: Benvenuto in Eco, cittadino.\n\nIntorno a te c'è un'ecosistema vivente, ricco di piante, animali e risorse naturali.  Diamo un'occhiata in giro.
Portuguese: Welcome to Eco, citizen.\n\nAround you is a living ecosystem, rich with plants, animals, and natural resources.  Let's take a look around.
Hungarian: Üdvözlünk ez Ecoban, állampolgár.\n\nKörülötted egy élő ökoszisztéma van, tele növényekkel, állatokkal, és nyersanyagokkal. Nézz körül.
Japanese: Ecoへようこそ、市民。\n\nあなたを取り巻くものは植物、動物、天然資源に富んだ生きた生態系です。周りを見てみましょう。
Norwegian: Velkommen til Eco, borger.\n\nRundt deg er et levende økosystem, rik med planter, dyr og naturressurser.  La oss ta en titt.
Polish: Witaj w świecie Eco.\n\nWokół Ciebie znajduje się żyjący ekosystem bogaty w rośliny, zwierzęta i surowce naturalne. Rozejrzyj się dookoła.
Dutch: Welkom in Eco, burger.\n\nJe bevindt je in een levend ecosysteem, dat rijk is aan planten, dieren en natuurlijke hulpbronnen. Neem rustig een kijkje.
Romanian: Bine ați venit la Eco, cetățean. \n\nÎn jurul tău este un ecosistem viu, bogat cu plante, animale și resurse naturale. Să aruncăm o privire în jur.
Danish: Velkommen til Eco, borger.\n\nRundt dig er et levende økosystem, rig på planter, dyr og naturressourcer. Lad os se os omkring.
Czech: Vítej v Eco, občane. \n\nOkolo tebe je žijící ekosystém, bohatý na rostliny, zvířata a přírodní suroviny. Pojďme se porozhlédnout okolo.
Swedish: Välkomen till Eco, medborgare.\n\n Runt om dig är det ett levande ecosystem, rikt med växter, djur och naturresurser. Låt oss ta en titt.
Ukrainian: Вітаємо в Eco, громадянине!\n\nНавколо вас жива екосистема, багата рослинами, тваринами та натуральними ресурсами. Давайте оглянемо все це.
Greek: Πολίτη, καλώς Όρισες στο Eco.\n\nΤριγύρω σου είναι ένα ζωντανό οικοσύστημα, πλούσιο σε φυτά, ζώα και φυσικούς πόρους. Ας ρίξουμε μια ματιά τριγύρω.
Arabic: Welcome to Eco, citizen.\n\nAround you is a living ecosystem, rich with plants, animals, and natural resources.  Let's take a look around.
Vietnamese: Welcome to Eco, citizen.\n\nAround you is a living ecosystem, rich with plants, animals, and natural resources.  Let's take a look around.
Turkish: Eco'ya hoş geldin yurttaş.\n\nEtrafında bitkilerle, hayvanlarla ve doğal kaynaklarla zenginleştirilmiş bir ekosistem var. Hadi etrafa bir göz atalım.

English: To build a civilization within an ecosystem, you're going to need to know a lot about both.\n\nUse the World View to find your way around, map out the economy, and view the state of the environment.
French: Pour bâtir une civilisation au sein d’un écosystème, il vous faudra en apprendre beaucoup sur les deux.\n\nUtilisez la vue du monde pour vous y retrouver, afficher l’économie et l’état de l’environnement.
Spanish: Para construir una civilización dentro de un ecosistema, vas a tener que aprender mucho sobre ambos.\n\nUtiliza la "Vista del mundo" para explorar tus alrededores, controlar la economía y ver el estado del medio ambiente.
German: Um eine Zivilisation in einem Ökosystem aufzubauen, musst du sehr viel über beides wissen.\n\nNutze die Karte, um dich zurechtzufinden, die Wirtschaft zu entwickeln und den Zustand der Umgebung einzusehen.
Korean: 생태계 내에서 문명을 지으실려면 두 가지를 명심 하셔야할 것이 있습니다.\n\n'세계 보기'를 이용하여 경제를 살펴보고 근처의 환경 상태를 확인하십시요.
BrazillianPortuguese: Para construir uma civilização dentro de um ecossistema, você precisará saber muito sobre ambos.\n\nUse a Visão de Mundo para encontrar seu caminho, mapear a economia e ver o estado do meio ambiente.
SimplifedChinese: 要在生态系统中建立一个文明，你需要了解各种信息。\n\n使用世界概览来找到前往各地的路径，在地图上显示并查看经济与环境状态。
Russian: Для построения цивилизации в экосистеме, вам необходимо много знать и о том, и о другом.\n\nИспользуйте карту мира для навигации, планирования экономики и слежения за состоянием окружающей среды.
Italian: Per costruire una civiltà in un ecosistema, dovrai sapere molto su entrambi.\n\nUsa la Visuale del Mondo per orientarti, mappare l'economia e vedere lo stato ambientale.
Portuguese: To build a civilization within an ecosystem, you're going to need to know a lot about both.\n\nUse the World View to find your way around, map out the economy, and view the state of the environment.
Hungarian: To build a civilization within an ecosystem, you're going to need to know a lot about both.\n\nUse the World View to find your way around, map out the economy, and view the state of the environment.
Japanese: 生態系内で文明を構築するには、両方について多くのことを学ぶ必要があります。\n\nワールドビューを探して表示し、経済と環境の状態を確認してください
Norwegian: To build a civilization within an ecosystem, you're going to need to know a lot about both.\n\nUse the World View to find your way around, map out the economy, and view the state of the environment.
Polish: Aby zbudować cywilizację w ramach ekosystemu, będziesz musiał się wiele dowiedzieć o obydwu.\n\nUżyj Widoku Świata aby odnaleźć się na mapie, zaplanować ekonomię i zobaczyć w jakim stanie jest środowisko.
Dutch: Om een beschaving in een ecosysteem te bouwen, zul je veel moeten weten over beide. \n\nGebruik het Wereldbeeld om de weg te vinden, de economie in kaart te brengen, en de status van het milieu te zien.
Romanian: To build a civilization within an ecosystem, you're going to need to know a lot about both.\n\nUse the World View to find your way around, map out the economy, and view the state of the environment.
Danish: For at opbygge en civilisation inden for et økosystem bliver du nødt til at vide meget om begge dele.\n\nBrug verdensvisningen til at finde vej rundt, kortlægge økonomien og se miljøtilstanden.
Czech: Aby jsi byl schopen postavit civilizaci v ekosystému, budeš potřebovat spoustu znalostí o obojím.\n\nPoužij náhled na svět aby ses mohl lépe orientovat, zkoumat ekonomiku a vidět stav životního prostředí.
Swedish: För att bygga en civilisation i ett ekosystem kommer du att behöva veta mycket om båda.\n\n Använd världsvy för att hitta din väg runt, kartlägga ekonomin och se miljön.
Ukrainian: Щоби побудувати цивілізацію в екосистемі, вам доведеться багато дізнатися про ці дві речі.\n\nВикористовуйте мапу світу для навігації, планування економіки та огляду за станом довкілля.
Greek: Για να χτίσεις έναν πολιτισμό στο οικοσύστημα, δεν χρειάζεται να γνωρίζεις πολλά και για τα δύο.\n\nΧρησιμοποίησε την Προβολή Κόσμου για να βρεις τον δρόμο σου, χαρτογράφησε την οικονομία και δες την κατάσταση του περιβάλλοντος.
Arabic: To build a civilization within an ecosystem, you're going to need to know a lot about both.\n\nUse the World View to find your way around, map out the economy, and view the state of the environment.
Vietnamese: To build a civilization within an ecosystem, you're going to need to know a lot about both.\n\nUse the World View to find your way around, map out the economy, and view the state of the environment.
Turkish: Bir ekosistemde medeniyet kurmak için, bu iki terimi iyice anlaman gerek.\n\nDünya Haritası'nı kullanarak nereye gideceğini öğren, ekonomi durumunu planla ve çevresel duruma geniş açıdan bir göz at.

English: Capri pants (also known as three quarter pants, capris, crop pants, pedal pushers, clam-diggers, flood pants, jams, highwaters, culottes, or toreador pants) are pants that are longer than shorts but are not as long as trousers.
French: Les bermudas (aussi appelés pantalons trois-quarts, bermuda, pantalons coupé, pédales, hauts-de-chausses, culottes ou pantalons toréador) sont des pantalons plus longs que les shorts mais moins longs que les pantalons.
Spanish: Pantalones Capri (también conocido como pantalones de tres cuartos, capris, pantalones de cultivo, empujadores del pedal, cavadores de la almeja, pantalones de inundación, "jams", aguas altas, culottes o pantalones de torero) son los pantalones más largos que los pantalones cortos, pero no tan largos como los pantalones largos.
German: Eine Caprihose (auch bekannt als Dreiviertelhose) ist eine Hose, die länger ist als Shorts, aber nicht so lang wie eine normale Hose.
Korean: 7부 바지는 반바지보다는 길지만 일반 바지보다는 짧은게 특징입니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: Calça capri (também conhecidas como calça de três quartos, calças cortadas, jams, e muitos outros) são calças mais compridas do que shorts, mas não tanto quanto as calças convencionais.

Russian: Штаны капри — укороченные брюки, они длиннее шорт, но лишь чуть ниже колен.
Italian: I pantaloni alla Capri (anche noti come pantaloni a tre quarti, pinocchietti, pantaloni da matador, culottes, pantaloncini medi, pedaliere o pantaloni per acqua alta) sono pantaloni più lunghi dei pantaloncini ma non tanto quanto i pantaloni normali.
Portuguese: Capri pants (also known as three quarter pants, capris, crop pants, pedal pushers, clam-diggers, flood pants, jams, highwaters, culottes, or toreador pants) are pants that are longer than shorts but are not as long as trousers.

Japanese: カプリパンツ(3/4パンツ、カプリ、作物パンツ、ペダルプッシャー、クラムデジグル、フラッドパンツ、ジャム、高水分、キュロット、トゥルードパンツとも呼ばれます) は、ショートパンツより長く、ズボンほど長くはないパンツです。

Dutch: Capribroeken (ook bekend als driekwartbroeken, capri's, cropbroeken, pedaalduwers, mossel-gravers, overstromingsbroeken, jams, hoogwaters, culottes of stierenvechterbroeken) zijn broeken die langer zijn dan shorts, maar niet zo lang als broeken.
Romanian: Capri pants (also known as three quarter pants, capris, crop pants, pedal pushers, clam-diggers, flood pants, jams, highwaters, culottes, or toreador pants) are pants that are longer than shorts but are not as long as trousers.
Danish: Capri-bukser er også bukser, der er længere end shorts, men som ikke er lige så lange som bukser, men også bukser, capris, crop crop, pedal pushers, clam-diggers, flood pants, jam, highwaters, culottes eller toreador pants.

English: A Henley shirt is a collarless pullover shirt, characterized by a placket beneath the round neckline, about 8 to 13 cm long and usually having 2?5 buttons. It essentially resembles a collarless polo shirt.
French: Une chemise Henley est un pull-over sans col, caractérisée par une patte de boutonnage sous l'encolure ronde, d'environ 8 à 13 cm de long et comportant habituellement 2 à 5 boutons. Il ressemble essentiellement à un polo sans col.
Spanish: Una camisa Henley es una camiseta jersey sin cuello, caracterizada por una solapa bajo el escote redondo, de unos 8 a 13 cm de largo y generalmente con 2 a 5 botones. Se parece esencialmente a una camisa de polo sin cuello.
German: Ein Henleyshirt ist ein kragenloser Pullover, der sich dadurch auszeichnet, dass er eine Knopfleiste unterhalb des Rundhalsauschnittes hat. Diese ist meistens 8 bis 13 cm lang und hat 2 bis 5 Knöpfe. Grundsätzlich ähnelt es einem kragenlosen Poloshirt.
Korean: 헨리 셔츠는 깃이 없는 풀오버 셔츠로, 목 선 옆에 8에서 13cm의 길이로 옆이 트였고 보통 2개에서 5개의 단추가 있는 특징이 있으며, 본질적으로는 깃이 없는 폴로 셔츠를 닮았습니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: Um camisa Henley é uma pullover sem gola, caracterizada por uma carcela abaixo da volta do pescoço, entorno de 8 à 13 cm longo e normalmente tendo 2 à 5 botões. Basicamente lembra uma camisa pólo sem gola.
SimplifedChinese: 亨利衫是一种无领的套头衬衫，特点是门襟在圆领下，约8至13厘米长，通常有2-5个纽扣。本质很像无领网球衫。
Russian: Хенли, представляет собой не что иное, как футболку, надеваемую через голову, без отложного воротника, но с рядом пуговиц (обычно от двух до пяти) в застёжке (длиной от 8 до 13 см), идущей от горла.
Italian: Una camicia Henley è una camicia senza colletto, caratterizzata da un'abbottonatura sotto la scollatura arrotondata, lunga circa da 8 a 13 cm e di solito avente da 2 a 5 bottoni. Essenzialmente somiglia a una polo senza colletto.
Portuguese: A Henley shirt is a collarless pullover shirt, characterized by a placket beneath the round neckline, about 8 to 13 cm long and usually having 2?5 buttons. It essentially resembles a collarless polo shirt.
Hungarian: A Henley shirt is a collarless pullover shirt, characterized by a placket beneath the round neckline, about 8 to 13 cm long and usually having 2?5 buttons. It essentially resembles a collarless polo shirt.
Japanese: ヘンリーシャツは首回りネクタイの下に約8〜13cmの長さの、通常2〜5のボタンを備えた襟元のプルオーバーシャツを特徴とする首輪のないプルオーバーシャツです。 それは本質的に襟なしのポロシャツに似ています。
Norwegian: A Henley shirt is a collarless pullover shirt, characterized by a placket beneath the round neckline, about 8 to 13 cm long and usually having 2?5 buttons. It essentially resembles a collarless polo shirt.
Polish: Koszulka Henley to bluzka bez kołnierzyka nakładana przez głowę, charakterystyczna poprzez rozcięcie pod dekoltem, ma od około 8 do 13 cm długości i przeważnie od 2 do 5 guzików. Zasadniczo przypomina koszulkę polo bez kołnierzyka.
Dutch: Een Henley-shirt is een kraagloos pullover-shirt, gekenmerkt door een knopenlijst onder de ronde halslijn, ongeveer 8 tot 13 cm lang en meestal met 2 - 5 knopen. Het lijkt in wezen op een kraagloos poloshirt.
Romanian: A Henley shirt is a collarless pullover shirt, characterized by a placket beneath the round neckline, about 8 to 13 cm long and usually having 2?5 buttons. It essentially resembles a collarless polo shirt.
Danish: En Henley-skjorte er en trøje uden krave, der er kendetegnet ved en knap under den runde udskæring, ca. 8 til 13 cm lang og normalt har 2? 5 knapper. Det ligner i det væsentlige en poloshirt uden krave.
Czech: Tričko Henley je svetr bez límce, který se vyznačuje kulatým výstřihem, dlouhým asi 8 až 13 cm a obvykle s 2–5 knoflíky. V podstatě to připomíná polokošile bez límce.
Swedish: En Henley tröja är en ärmlös tröja, den har en rund nacklinje, och är ungefär 8 till 13 cm lång. Den brukar ha ca 5 knappar. Tröjan liknar en polotröja förutom att den inte har extra tyget uppe vid nacken.
Ukrainian: Сорочка Хенлі — суцільна безкомірцева сорочка, з застібкою нижче круглого вирізують для шиї ( розмірами від 8 до 13 см і 2-5 ґудзиками). По суті, нагадує безкомірцеву сорочку поло.
Greek: Μια μπλούζα Henly είναι ένα πουλόβερ χωρίς ζιβάγκο, που χαρακτηρίζεται από μία σχισμή κάτω από το στρογγυλό της λαιμογραμμής, περίπου 8 με 13 εκατοστά μακριά και συνήθως έχει 2-5 κουμπιά. Ουσιαστικά μοιάζει με ένα μπλουζάκι πόλο.
Arabic: A Henley shirt is a collarless pullover shirt, characterized by a placket beneath the round neckline, about 8 to 13 cm long and usually having 2?5 buttons. It essentially resembles a collarless polo shirt.
Vietnamese: A Henley shirt is a collarless pullover shirt, characterized by a placket beneath the round neckline, about 8 to 13 cm long and usually having 2?5 buttons. It essentially resembles a collarless polo shirt.
Turkish: Henley gömleği, yaklaşık 8 ila 13 cm uzunluğunda ve genellikle 2 ila 5 düğmeli, yuvarlak yakasının altında bir yırtmaç ile karakterize edilmiş yakasız bir gömlektir. Aslında yakasız bir polo tişörtüne benzer.

English: Knee-high boots are boots that rise to the knee, or slightly thereunder. They are generally tighter around the leg shaft and ankle than at the top.
French: Les cuissardes sont des bottes qui montent jusqu'au genou, ou légèrement sous celui-ci. Ils sont généralement plus serrés autour de l'axe de la jambe et de la cheville qu'en haut.
Spanish: Botas altas hasta la rodilla son botas que se elevan hasta la rodilla, o levemente debajo de ella. Generalmente están más apretados alrededor del eje de la pierna y el tobillo que en la parte superior.
German: Kniehohe Stiefel sind Stiefel, die ungefähr bis zu den Knien gehen. An den Waden und Fußgelenken sind sie enger als an den Knien.
Korean: 롱부츠는 무릎 혹은 그 위까지 올라오는 부츠입니다. 보통 발목과 종아리 부분이 무릎보다는 더 조입니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: As botas de cano alto costumam chegar até os joelhos, ou um pouco abaixo. Elas são geralmente mais apertadas em torno do eixo da perna e tornozelo do que na parte superior.
SimplifedChinese: 长筒靴就是高到膝盖的靴子，或者低一点。通常在脚和脚踝处比上部会更紧。
Russian: Ботфорты - это сапоги которые доходят до колен, или чуть ниже. Обычно они туже у голени, нежели у колена.
Italian: Gli stivali alle ginocchia sono stivali che arrivano al ginocchio, o lievemente più bassi. Generalmente sono più rigidi intorno alla caviglia.
Portuguese: Knee-high boots are boots that rise to the knee, or slightly thereunder. They are generally tighter around the leg shaft and ankle than at the top.
Hungarian: Knee-high boots are boots that rise to the knee, or slightly thereunder. They are generally tighter around the leg shaft and ankle than at the top.
Japanese: ニーハイブーツは、膝またはその下に少し浮かぶブーツです。 彼らは一般的に、脚のシャフトと足首の周りが上部よりも堅いです。
Norwegian: Knee-high boots are boots that rise to the knee, or slightly thereunder. They are generally tighter around the leg shaft and ankle than at the top.
Polish: Buty podkolanowe są to buty, które dochodzą mniej więcej aż do kolan. Są one zwężające się ku dołowi.
Dutch: Kniehoge laarzen zijn laarzen die tot aan de knie reiken, of iets daaronder. Ze zijn over het algemeen strakker rond de beenschacht en enkel dan aan de bovenkant.
Romanian: Knee-high boots are boots that rise to the knee, or slightly thereunder. They are generally tighter around the leg shaft and ankle than at the top.
Danish: Knæhøje støvler er støvler, der stiger til knæet eller lidt derunder. De er generelt strammere omkring benakslen og anklen end øverst.
Czech: Boty po kolena je obuv, která stoupá ke kolenům nebo mírně pod nimi. Obecně jsou těsnější kolem nártu a kotníku než nahoře.
Swedish: Knähöga boots som går upp till knä och en aning där under. De är normalt sätt lite åtsittande vid fot och ankel än uppe vid benet.
Ukrainian: Ботфорти — чоботи, що доходять до колін, або, трохи нижче. Зазвичай, тугіші при гомілці, чим при коліні.
Greek: Οι "ψηλές μπότες ως το γόνατο" είναι μπότες που φτάνουν ως το γόνατο ή λίγο πιο κάτω από αυτό. Είναι πιο σφιχτές γύρο από το ν αστράγαλο από ότι ψηλά.
Arabic: Knee-high boots are boots that rise to the knee, or slightly thereunder. They are generally tighter around the leg shaft and ankle than at the top.
Vietnamese: Knee-high boots are boots that rise to the knee, or slightly thereunder. They are generally tighter around the leg shaft and ankle than at the top.

English: Sturdy pair of slim-fit pants. Trousers are an item of clothing worn from the waist to the ankles, covering both legs separately (rather than with cloth extending across both legs as in robes, skirts, and dresses).
French: Un robuste paire de pantalons slim-fit. Le pantalon est un élément des vêtements portés de la taille aux chevilles, couvrant les deux jambes séparément (plutôt qu’avec du tissu s’étendant sur les deux jambes comme dans des robes ou des jupes).
Spanish: Un par de pantalones resistentes y delgados. Los pantalones son una prenda de vestir que se lleva desde la cintura hasta los tobillos, cubriendo ambas piernas por separado (en lugar de cubrirlas con un paño que se extiende a través de ambas piernas, como en túnicas, faldas y vestidos).
German: Robuste, enge Hose. Eine Hose ist ein Kleidungsstück, das beide Beine jeweils einzeln bedeckt und von der Hüfte bis zu den Knöcheln reicht (im Gegensatz zu Roben, Röcken und Kleidern, deren Stoff beide Beine zusammen bedeckt).
Korean: 슬림 핏 팬츠는 튼튼한 한 쌍으로 조화를 이룹니다. 바지들은 보통 허리에서 발목까지 덮는 의류로 각각 다리를 따로 보호해줍니다 (로브, 스커트, 드레스와 같은 의류들은 통으로 다리를 감싸는 것과 다릅니다).
BrazillianPortuguese: Um par de calças justas e resistentes. As calças são uma peça de roupa usada da cintura até os tornozelos, cobrindo ambas as pernas separadamente (em vez de um tecido que se estende por ambas as pernas, como em túnicas, saias e vestidos).
SimplifedChinese: 结实的修身裤。裤子是从腰部到脚踝穿上，分别覆盖两腿 (而不是用布盖着两腿，像长袍，短裙，还有连衣裙)。
Russian: Прочные брюки с узкой посадкой. Брюки - это элемент одежды, который носят от талии до щиколотки, их ткань охватывает каждую ногу отдельно (а не свисает вокруг обеих ног, как у робы, юбки или платья).
Italian: Robusto paio di pantaloni aderenti. I pantaloni sono articoli d'abbigliamento indossati dalla vita alle caviglie, che coprono entrambe le gambe separatamente (piuttosto che con tessuto esteso tra entrambe le gambe, come per abiti lunghi, gonne e vestiti).
Portuguese: Sturdy pair of slim-fit pants. Trousers are an item of clothing worn from the waist to the ankles, covering both legs separately (rather than with cloth extending across both legs as in robes, skirts, and dresses).
Hungarian: Sturdy pair of slim-fit pants. Trousers are an item of clothing worn from the waist to the ankles, covering both legs separately (rather than with cloth extending across both legs as in robes, skirts, and dresses).
Japanese: 丈夫なスリムフィットのペアのパンツ。 ズボンというのは、腰から足首まで隠し、両脚を別々に覆う衣類です(ローブ、スカート、ドレスのように両脚を横切る形の布ではありません).
Norwegian: Sturdy pair of slim-fit pants. Trousers are an item of clothing worn from the waist to the ankles, covering both legs separately (rather than with cloth extending across both legs as in robes, skirts, and dresses).
Polish: Wytrzymała para rurek. Spodnie są elementem ubioru noszonym od pasa do kostek, zasłaniając oddzielnie obydwie nogi (a nie jakąś szmatką pałętającą się miedzy nogami jak szaty, spódniczki czy suknie).
Dutch: Stevige slim-fit broek. Broeken zijn kledingstukken die vanaf de taille tot aan de enkels worden gedragen en beide benen afzonderlijk bedekken (in plaats van een doek dat zich over beide benen uitstrekt zoals in gewaden, rokken en jurken).

English: Scales how time of day matches real time.  Higher numbers result in shorter day/night cycles, but will not affect simulation speed.

English: The exponential rate parameter describing the birth rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition.  The % of the population in the area that will reproduce in one tick.
French: Le paramètre de vitesse exponentielle qui décrit le taux de natalité de l’espèce dans des conditions de croissance idéales sans concurrence. Le pourcentage de la population dans la zone qui se reproduira en un battement.
Spanish: El parámetro de tasa exponencial que describe la tasa de natalidad de la especie en condiciones ideales de crecimiento y sin competencia.  El % de la población en el área que se reproducirá en una solo tick.
German: Der Exponentialratenparameter beschreibt die Vermehrungsrate der Spezies unter idealen Wachstumsbedingungen und ohne Konkurrenz. Der Prozentsatz der Population in der Region, der pro Tick stirbt, sollte immer geringer als der der Reproduktion sein.
Korean: 알맞은 성장 환경과 경쟁 없는 환경 내에서 종의 출생 비율을 나타내는 지수 분포입니다. 1틱동안 동식물이 증식될 확률을 나타내는 퍼센트입니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: O parâmetro de taxa exponencial que descreve a taxa de natalidade da espécie em condições de crescimento ideais e nenhuma competição. A % da população na área que se reproduzirá em um momento.
SimplifedChinese: 指数参数描述的是物种在理想生活状态和没有竞争下的出生率。该地区一次刷新内会繁殖种群的百分比。
Russian: Показатель экспоненциальной скорости, характеризующий рождаемость вида в идеальных условиях роста и в отсутствии конкуренции. % популяции в области, которое будет воспроизводиться в один такт.
Italian: Il parametro del tasso esponenziale che descrive il tasso di nascita delle specie in condizioni di crescita ideali e senza competizione.  La % della popolazione nell'area che si riprodurrà in un tick.
Portuguese: The exponential rate parameter describing the birth rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition.  The % of the population in the area that will reproduce in one tick.
Hungarian: The exponential rate parameter describing the birth rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition.  The % of the population in the area that will reproduce in one tick.

English: The exponential rate parameter describing the death rate of the species in ideal growth conditions and no competition.  The % of the population in the area that will die in one tick.  Should always be LESS than MaxGrowthRate.

English: The temperature range that can support this plant (albeit at reduced efficiency if the temperature is not also within the ideal range).  Temperatures outside this range prohibit reproduction entirely and prevent any yield at all.
French: Les variations de température qui permet à cette plante de vivre (même si elle peut se développer à un rythme réduit en dehors ce ces variations). La température en dehors de ces variations empêche la reproduction et toute récolte.
Spanish: El rango de temperatura que puede soportar esta planta (aunque no en reducción de la eficacia si la temperatura no está también dentro de la gama ideal).  Temperaturas fuera de este rango prohíben completamente la reproducción y previenen cualquier rendimiento en absoluto.
German: Die Temperaturspanne, die für diese Pflanze geeignet ist (wenn auch mit reduzierter Effizienz, falls die Temperatur nicht im idealen Bereich liegt). Temperaturen außerhalb dieses Bereichs, verhindern die Reproduktion gänzlich und außerdem jeglichen Ertrag.
Korean: 이 식물을 육성할 수 있는 온도 범위 (온도가 이상 범위 내에 없는 경우는 효율이 떨어집니다). 온도가 범위 외의 경우는 성장을 완전히 중지하고 생산량이 하나도 없을겁니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: A faixa de temperatura que esta planta pode suportar (a eficiência é reduzida se a temperatura não estiver dentro da faixa ideal). As temperaturas fora dessa faixa proíbem totalmente a reprodução e impedem qualquer rendimento.
SimplifedChinese: 可以支持该植物生长的温度范围 (温度不在理想范围内效率会降低)。温度在该范围外会完全阻止作物繁殖并不会有任何收成。

English: This is a test server containing the next release of the game, which will be kept stable (so you can play normally here long-term).\n\nTo play here, you will need to switch to the staging build.
French: C'est un serveur test contenant les prochaines fonctionnalités du jeu, qui sera maintenu de manière stable (vous pouvez donc jouer ici sur le long terme).\n\nPour jouer ici, vous devez changer pour la version de test.
Spanish: Este es un servidor de prueba que contiene la próxima versión estable del juego para que puedas jugar sin inconvenientes a largo plazo.\n\nPara jugar aquí, necesitarás cambiarte a la compilación de "staging".
German: Dies ist ein Testserver mit der nächsten Version des Spiels, der stabil gehalten wird (so dass du hier lange spielen kannst).\n\nUm hier spielen zu können, musst du zum Staging Build wechseln.

BrazillianPortuguese: Este é um servidor de teste contendo a próxima versão do jogo, que será mantida estável (para que você possa jogar normalmente aqui por um longo prazo).\n\nPara jogar aqui, você precisará utilizar a versão de desenvolvimento (Staging).

English: To switch to the staging build, in Steam, right click Eco and select 'Properties'.  On the Beta tab, opt-in and select the build called 'Staging'.

English: Whether to enable stat database writes.  If disabled, will make some features not function, such as web graphs and laws that reference action counts.
French: S'il faut activer l'écriture de stats sur la base de données.  S'il est désactivé, certaines fonctionnalités ne fonctionneront pas, comme les graphiques web et les lois qui font référence à un nombre d'action.
Spanish: Si se debe habilitar o no la escritura de la base de datos de estadísticas.  Si está desactivado, hará que algunas funciones no funcionen, como los gráficos web y las leyes que hacen referencia a la acción cuentan.
German: Ob in die Statistikdatenbank geschrieben werden soll. Wenn deaktiviert, werden einige Funktionen wie Webgraphen und Gesetze, die auf Aktionszahlen Bezug nehmen, nicht funktionieren.
Korean: 통계 데이터베이스 쓰기의 활성화 여부를 정하는 옵션. 비활성화할 경우 웹 그래프 및 동작 횟수를 참조하는 법률과 같은 일부 기능이 작동하지 않습니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: Deve se habilitar as gravação de banco de dados de estatísticas. Se desativado, fará com que alguns recursos não funcionem, como gráficos da web e leis que fazem referência a contagens de ação.
SimplifedChinese: 是否启用统计数据库写入。如禁用，将导致某些功能失效，如网页图形和引用动作计数的规律。
Russian: Включить ли запись статистики в БД.  Отключение может повысить производительность сервера, но приведет к тому, что некоторые функции (такие как веб-графики и законы, ссылающиеся на количество действий) не будут работать.
Italian: Se abilitare le scritture del database delle statistiche.  Se disabilitate, non faranno funzionare alcune funzionalità, come i grafici web e le leggi riferite ai conteggi di azioni.
Portuguese: Whether to enable stat database writes.  If disabled, will make some features not function, such as web graphs and laws that reference action counts.
Hungarian: Whether to enable stat database writes.  If disabled, will make some features not function, such as web graphs and laws that reference action counts.
Japanese: 統計データベース書き込みを有効にするかどうか。無効にすると、Webグラフやアクションカウントを参照する法則など、一部の機能が機能しなくなります
Norwegian: Whether to enable stat database writes.  If disabled, will make some features not function, such as web graphs and laws that reference action counts.
Polish: Czy włączyć odczyty statystyki zapisu bazy danych. Jeśli ta opcja jest wyłączona, niektóre funkcje nie będą działać, takie jak grafiki internetowe i przepisy, które odnoszą się do liczby działań.
Dutch: Whether to enable stat database writes.  If disabled, will make some features not function, such as web graphs and laws that reference action counts.

Czech: Whether to enable stat database writes.  If disabled, will make some features not function, such as web graphs and laws that reference action counts.
Swedish: Whether to enable stat database writes.  If disabled, will make some features not function, such as web graphs and laws that reference action counts.
Ukrainian: Чи дозволити запис до бази даних статистики. Якщо вимкнено, то це зробить деякі функції недоступними, наприклад веб-графіки і закони, що посилаються на кількість дій.
Greek: Γράφει ακόμα και αν ενεργοποιήσεις την στατιστική βάση δεδομένων. Αν απενεργοποιηθεί, ορισμένα χαρακτηριστικά δεν θα λειτουργήσουν, όπως γραφήματα ιστού και νόμοι που αναφέρουν τον αριθμό των ενεργειών.

English: This lists the currency you are selling, and how much you charge for each unit (specified in the other currency).\n\nTrades will only be made if it matches the owner's 'holding limit', which they can setup on the exchange.
French: Cette liste indique la monnaie que vous vendez, et combien vous facturez pour chaque unité (spécifié dans l'autre monnaie).\n\nLes transactions ne seront effectuées que si elles correspondent à la 'limite de dépôt' du propriétaire, qu'il peut établir sur l'échange.
Spanish: En él se indica la moneda que está vendiendo y cuánto cobra por cada unidad (especificado en la otra divisa).\n\nLas operaciones sólo se realizarán si coinciden con el "límite de tenencia" del propietario, que puede establecer en la bolsa.
German: Dies listet die Währung die du verkaufst und wie viel jede Einheit kostet (angegeben in der anderen Währung).\n\n#Ein Handel wird nur erfolgen, wenn dieser den angegebenen Limits entspricht, welche du beim Erstellen des Umtauschangebots festlegen kannst.
Korean: 이 목록에는 판매하는 통화와 각 단위에 대한 청구 금액(기타 통화에 지정됨)이 기재되어 있습니다.\n\n소유자가 환전소에서 설정할 수 있는 '보유 한도'와 일치할 경우에만 거래가 성사됩니다.

English: These lists define the limits you will trade within for a given currency. Trades will be prevented if it would make your currency above or below the given range.
French: Ces listes définissent les limites dans lesquelles vous allez commercer pour une monnaie donnée. Les transactions seront empêchées si votre monnaie se trouve au-dessus ou en dessous de la fourchette donnée.

English: Brace yourself, and look up.\n\nThere's something orbiting in the sky you need to see.
French: Préparez-vous et levez les yeux.\n\nIl y a quelque chose en orbite dans le ciel que vous devez voir.
Spanish: Toma aire y alza la vista.\n\nHay algo orbitando en el cielo que deberías ver.
German: Mach dich bereit und schau nach oben.\n\nDa kreist etwas am Himmel, dass du sehen musst.
Korean: 마음 단단히 먹고, 하늘 위를 쳐다보세요.\n\n상공을 빙빙 돌고 있는 물체가 있습니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: Prepare-se, e olhe para cima.\n\nHá algo orbitando no céu que você precisa ver.
SimplifedChinese: 振作起来，抬头看看。\n\n注意，有东西进入太空轨道运行了。
Russian: Приготовьтесь и взгляните вверх.\n\nЧто-то летает в небе и вы должны это увидеть.
Italian: Tieniti forte, e guarda su.\n\nC'è qualcosa che orbita nel cielo che devi vedere.
Portuguese: Brace yourself, and look up.\n\nThere's something orbiting in the sky you need to see.
Hungarian: Brace yourself, and look up.\n\nThere's something orbiting in the sky you need to see.
Japanese: 心の準備をしてから、空を見上げてください。\n\n恐ろしいものが上空を周回しています。
Norwegian: Brace yourself, and look up.\n\nThere's something orbiting in the sky you need to see.
Polish: Przygotuj się i spójrz w niebo.\n\n Na orbicie jest coś, co musisz zobaczyć.
Dutch: Brace yourself, and look up.\n\nThere's something orbiting in the sky you need to see.
Romanian: Brace yourself, and look up.\n\nThere's something orbiting in the sky you need to see.
Danish: Brace yourself, and look up.\n\nThere's something orbiting in the sky you need to see.
Czech: Brace yourself, and look up.\n\nThere's something orbiting in the sky you need to see.
Swedish: Brace yourself, and look up.\n\nThere's something orbiting in the sky you need to see.
Ukrainian: Наважтеся поглянути угору.\n\n Там угорі щось є і вам конче необхідно це побачити.
Greek: Φρόντισε τον εαυτό σου και κοίταξε επάνω.\n\nΥπάρχει κάτι που είναι σε τροχιά στον ουρανό και πρέπει να το δεις.
Arabic: Brace yourself, and look up.\n\nThere's something orbiting in the sky you need to see.
Vietnamese: Brace yourself, and look up.\n\nThere's something orbiting in the sky you need to see.
Turkish: Sıkı dur ve yukarı bak.\n\nGökyüzü yörüngesinde görmen gereken bir şey var.

English: The first step is to find an appropriate place to set up your camp.
French: La première étape est de trouver un endroit approprié pour mettre en place votre camp.
Spanish: El primer paso es encontrar un lugar adecuado donde establecer tu campamento.
German: Der erste Schritt ist, einen geeigneten Ort für ein Lager zu finden.
Korean: 첫 번째 단계는 적당한 장소를 찾아서 캠프를 설치하는 것입니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: O primeiro passo é encontrar um local apropriado para montar seu acampamento.
SimplifedChinese: 首先，找到搭建营地的合适位置。
Russian: Для начала найдите место для вашего лагеря.
Italian: Il primo passo è trovare un luogo appropriato per impostare il tuo campo.
Portuguese: The first step is to find an appropriate place to set up your camp.
Hungarian: The first step is to find an appropriate place to set up your camp.
Japanese: まず最初のステップは、キャンプを設営するのに適切な場所を見つけることです。
Norwegian: The first step is to find an appropriate place to set up your camp.
Polish: Pierwszym krokiem będzie znalezienia odpowiedniego miejsca do postawienia obozowiska.
Dutch: The first step is to find an appropriate place to set up your camp.
Romanian: The first step is to find an appropriate place to set up your camp.
Danish: The first step is to find an appropriate place to set up your camp.
Czech: The first step is to find an appropriate place to set up your camp.
Swedish: The first step is to find an appropriate place to set up your camp.
Ukrainian: Перший крок — пошук хорошого місця для вашого табору.
Greek: Το πρώτο βήμα είναι να βρεις ένα κατάλληλο μέρος και να φτιάξεις μία κατασκήνωση.
Arabic: The first step is to find an appropriate place to set up your camp.
Vietnamese: The first step is to find an appropriate place to set up your camp.
Turkish: İlk adım kampını kurmak için müsait bir yer bulmak.

English: It's probably a good idea to find a location close to natural resources such as food, surface stone, or trees.
French: C'est probablement une bonne idée de trouver un endroit près de ressources naturelles comme de la nourriture, de la pierre ou des arbres.
Spanish: Probablemente sea una buena idea encontrar una ubicación cercana a recursos naturales tales como comida, depósitos de piedra o árboles.
German: Es ist womöglich eine gute Idee, einen Ort zu finden, der nah an Ressourcen wie Nahrung, Steinen oder Bäumen liegt.
Korean: 음식, 돌, 나무 등 천연 자원과 가까운 장소를 찾으면 좋을 겁니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: É provavelmente uma boa ideia encontrar um local próximo a recursos naturais, como alimentos, pedras na superfície ou árvores.
SimplifedChinese: 找个靠近自然资源（比如食物、地表岩石或树木）的位置，或许是个不错的主意。
Russian: Будет неплохо если поблизости будут ресурсы, например еда, камень и деревья.
Italian: Probabilmente è una buona idea trovare un luogo vicino a risorse naturali come cibo, pietra superficiale o alberi.
Portuguese: It's probably a good idea to find a location close to natural resources such as food, surface stone, or trees.
Hungarian: It's probably a good idea to find a location close to natural resources such as food, surface stone, or trees.
Japanese: 食料や石材、木などの資源に近い場所を探すと良いでしょう。
Norwegian: It's probably a good idea to find a location close to natural resources such as food, surface stone, or trees.
Polish: Dobrym pomysłem może być znalezienie lokalizacji znajdującej się blisko zasobów naturalnych, takich jak: jedzenie, kamień, drzewa.
Dutch: It's probably a good idea to find a location close to natural resources such as food, surface stone, or trees.
Romanian: It's probably a good idea to find a location close to natural resources such as food, surface stone, or trees.
Danish: It's probably a good idea to find a location close to natural resources such as food, surface stone, or trees.
Czech: It's probably a good idea to find a location close to natural resources such as food, surface stone, or trees.
Swedish: It's probably a good idea to find a location close to natural resources such as food, surface stone, or trees.
Ukrainian: Гарною ідеєю є знайти місцевість, наповнену природними ресурсами, як-от їжа, каміння або дерева.
Greek: Είναι ίσως μία καλή ιδέα το να βρεις μία τοποθεσία κοντά σε φυσικούς πόρους όπως φαγητό, πέτρα ή δέντρα.
Arabic: It's probably a good idea to find a location close to natural resources such as food, surface stone, or trees.
Vietnamese: It's probably a good idea to find a location close to natural resources such as food, surface stone, or trees.
Turkish: Yiyecek, ağaç ve yeryüzü kayaçları gibi doğal kaynaklara yakın bir yer bulmak muhtemelen iyi bir fikir olur.

English: Normally when you place objects, they will be public unless they are placed on land you own. Fortunately, you already own the land around your camp.
French: Normalement, lorsque vous placez des objets, ils seront publics à moins qu'ils ne soient placés sur un terrain qui vous appartient. Heureusement, vous possédez déjà le terrain autour de votre camp.
Spanish: Normalmente, cuando colocas objetos en el mundo serán de acceso público, a menos que sean colocados en una superficie de tu propiedad. Afortunadamente ya eres el propietario de la superficie alrededor de tu campamento.
German: Wenn du Objekte platzierst, werden sie öffentlich zugänglich sein, es sei denn, sie befinden sich auf Land, dass dir gehört. Glücklicherweise besitzt du bereits das Land rund um dein Lager.
Korean: 자신이 소유한 땅 위에 배치하는 것이 아니라면 일반적으로 개체를 배치할 경우 공용이 됩니다. 다행히 당신은 캠프 주변의 땅을 이미 소유하고 있습니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: Normalmente, quando você coloca objetos, eles serão públicos, a menos que sejam colocados no terreno que você possui. Felizmente, você já possui o terreno em volta do seu acampamento.
SimplifedChinese: 通常情况下，除非把物品放置在自身拥有的土地上，否则相关物品将成为公共物品。幸运的是，你已拥有营地周围的土地。
Russian: Размещённые не на личной земле объекты - общедоступны. К счастью, земля вокруг лагеря уже ваша.
Italian: Normalmente quando posizioni gli oggetti, saranno pubblici se non posizionati su un terreno che possiedi. Fortunatamente, possiedi già la terra intorno al tuo campo.
Portuguese: Normally when you place objects, they will be public unless they are placed on land you own. Fortunately, you already own the land around your camp.
Hungarian: Normally when you place objects, they will be public unless they are placed on land you own. Fortunately, you already own the land around your camp.
Japanese: 通常、あなたの所有する土地以外の場所にオブジェクトを配置した場合、そのオブジェクトは公共のものになります。でも大丈夫、あなたはキャンプの周りの土地をすでに所有しています。
Norwegian: Normally when you place objects, they will be public unless they are placed on land you own. Fortunately, you already own the land around your camp.
Polish: Przedmioty, które zazwyczaj umieścisz na ziemi będą oznaczone jako "publiczne", chyba, że postawisz je na swojej działce. Na szczęście posiadasz teraz własny kawałek ziemi wokół obozowiska.
Dutch: Normally when you place objects, they will be public unless they are placed on land you own. Fortunately, you already own the land around your camp.
Romanian: Normally when you place objects, they will be public unless they are placed on land you own. Fortunately, you already own the land around your camp.
Danish: Normally when you place objects, they will be public unless they are placed on land you own. Fortunately, you already own the land around your camp.
Czech: Normally when you place objects, they will be public unless they are placed on land you own. Fortunately, you already own the land around your camp.
Swedish: Normally when you place objects, they will be public unless they are placed on land you own. Fortunately, you already own the land around your camp.
Ukrainian: Зазвичай, коли ви розташовуєте об’єкти, вони будуть загальнодоступними, хіба що вони знаходяться на вашій власній землі. На щастя, ви вже власник землі навколо табору.
Greek: Κανονικά όταν τοποθετείς αντικείμενα, αυτά θα είναι δημόσια εκτός και αν τοποθετηθούν σε γη που κατέχεις. Ευτυχώς κατέχεις ήδη την γη γύρω από την κατασκήνωσή σου.
Arabic: Normally when you place objects, they will be public unless they are placed on land you own. Fortunately, you already own the land around your camp.
Vietnamese: Normally when you place objects, they will be public unless they are placed on land you own. Fortunately, you already own the land around your camp.
Turkish: Normalde objeleri yerleştirdiğinde, eğer obje sahip olduğunuz bir araziye koyulmamış ise halka açık olur. Neyse ki kampınızın civarında sahip olduğunuz bir arazi var.

English: In order to harvest resources and construct buildings, you'll need some tools. Fortunately, you've got a basic set all ready for you inside your new tent's inventory.
French: Pour récolter les ressources et construire des bâtiments, vous aurez besoin d'outils. Heureusement, vous avez un ensemble de base tout prêt pour vous à l'intérieur de l'inventaire de votre nouvelle tente.
Spanish: Para poder recolectar recursos y construir edificios, necesitarás algunas herramientas. Por suerte, tienes un conjunto básico listo para su uso dentro del inventario de tu nueva tienda.
German: Um Ressourcen zu ernten und Gebäude zu bauen, benötigst du einige Werkzeuge. Zum Glück hast du im Inventar deines neuen Zeltes ein grundlegendes Set von Werkzeugen bereitliegen.
Korean: 자원을 수확하고 건물을 건설하려면 도구가 필요합니다. 다행히 당신은 새로운 텐트의 인벤토리에 기본적인 도구들을 이미 갖고 있습니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: Para coletar recursos e começar a construir, você precisará de algumas ferramentas. Felizmente, você tem um conjunto básico pronto para você dentro do inventário de sua nova tenda.
SimplifedChinese: 旨在收集资源和建设建筑物，你将需要一些工具。很幸运，你的新帐篷库存里已有基本工具套件。
Russian: Для сбора ресурсов и строительства зданий, вам потребуются инструменты. К счастью ваш стартовый набор уже лежит в инвентаре вашей палатки.
Italian: Per raccogliere risorse e costruire edifici, ti serviranno degli strumenti. Fortunatamente, hai il set di base tutto pronto per te nell'inventario della tua nuova tenda.
Portuguese: In order to harvest resources and construct buildings, you'll need some tools. Fortunately, you've got a basic set all ready for you inside your new tent's inventory.
Hungarian: In order to harvest resources and construct buildings, you'll need some tools. Fortunately, you've got a basic set all ready for you inside your new tent's inventory.
Japanese: 資源を採取して建物を作るには、道具がいくつか必要です。でも大丈夫、あなたの新しいテントのインベントリには、基本的な道具のセットがあらかじめ入っています。
Norwegian: In order to harvest resources and construct buildings, you'll need some tools. Fortunately, you've got a basic set all ready for you inside your new tent's inventory.
Polish: Potrzebujesz narzędzi, żeby pozyskiwać zasoby i budować. Na szczęście posiadasz ich podstawowy zestaw, gotowy do użycia. Jest on w ekwipunku twojego nowego namiotu.
Dutch: In order to harvest resources and construct buildings, you'll need some tools. Fortunately, you've got a basic set all ready for you inside your new tent's inventory.
Romanian: In order to harvest resources and construct buildings, you'll need some tools. Fortunately, you've got a basic set all ready for you inside your new tent's inventory.
Danish: In order to harvest resources and construct buildings, you'll need some tools. Fortunately, you've got a basic set all ready for you inside your new tent's inventory.
Czech: In order to harvest resources and construct buildings, you'll need some tools. Fortunately, you've got a basic set all ready for you inside your new tent's inventory.
Swedish: In order to harvest resources and construct buildings, you'll need some tools. Fortunately, you've got a basic set all ready for you inside your new tent's inventory.
Ukrainian: Для збору ресурсів і спорудження будівель вам знадобляться певні інструменти. На щастя, для вас є готовий початковий набір у новому інвентарі намету.
Greek: Για να μαζέψεις πόρους και να κατασκευάσεις κτίρια, θα χρειαστείς μερικά εργαλεία. Ευτυχώς, έχεις ήδη τα βασικά μέσα στο inventory της νέας σου σκηνής.
Arabic: In order to harvest resources and construct buildings, you'll need some tools. Fortunately, you've got a basic set all ready for you inside your new tent's inventory.
Vietnamese: In order to harvest resources and construct buildings, you'll need some tools. Fortunately, you've got a basic set all ready for you inside your new tent's inventory.
Turkish: Yapılar inşa etmek ve kaynakları hasat etmek için bazı araçlara ihtiyacın olacak. Neyse ki, temel aletlerin hepsi yeni çadırının envanterinde senin için hazır durumda.

English: Materials such as logs and stone are best placed into stockpiles so that crafting tables can use the resources directly. Next to your tent there is a tiny stockpile suitable for a tiny amount of resources.
French: Les matériaux tels que les bûches et la pierre sont mieux placés dans les réserves pour que les tables d'artisanat puissent utiliser les ressources directement. A côté de votre tente, il y a une réserve minuscule qui peut contenir une petite quantité de ressources.
Spanish: Los materiales tales como troncos y piedra se guardan en almacenamientos, a los que las mesas de trabajo tienen acceso para usar dichos recursos directamente. Al lado de tu tienda de campaña hay una pila de almacenamiento diminuta, adecuada para una cantidad pequeña de recursos.
German: Materialien wie Baumstämme und Stein werden am besten in Lager eingelegt, damit die Herstellungstische die Ressourcen direkt verwenden können. Neben deinem Zelt befindet sich ein kleines Lager, das sich für eine kleine Anzahl an Ressourcen eignet.
Korean: 통나무, 돌과 같은 재료는 제작소에서 바로 이용할 수 있도록 자재 창고에 넣어두는 것이 가장 좋습니다. 텐트 옆에 약간의 자원을 보관할 수 있는 작은 자재 창고가 있습니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: Materiais como toras e pedras são melhor colocados em pilhas para que as mesas de trabalho possam usar os recursos diretamente. Ao lado de sua tenda, há um estoque minúsculo adequado para uma pequena quantidade de recursos.
SimplifedChinese: 原木和石头等材料最好放入料堆中，以便制作台能够直接使用相关资源。帐篷旁边有一个小型料堆，可用于存放少量资源。
Russian: Такие материалы как брёвна и камни лучше всего хранить на складах, так верстаки смогут использовать их напрямую. Рядом с вашей палаткой есть крошечный склад, куда вы можете положить немного ресурсов.
Italian: Materiali come tronchi e pietra sono posizionati meglio in cataste, così che i banchi da lavoro possano usare direttamente le risorse. Vicino alla tua tenda c'è una minuscola pila adatta per ogni minuscola quantità di risorse.
Portuguese: Materials such as logs and stone are best placed into stockpiles so that crafting tables can use the resources directly. Next to your tent there is a tiny stockpile suitable for a tiny amount of resources.
Hungarian: Materials such as logs and stone are best placed into stockpiles so that crafting tables can use the resources directly. Next to your tent there is a tiny stockpile suitable for a tiny amount of resources.
Japanese: 丸太や石などの材料は、作業台で直接利用できるように備蓄しておくのが良いでしょう。テントの横には、わずかな量の資源の保管に適した小さな備蓄庫があります。
Norwegian: Materials such as logs and stone are best placed into stockpiles so that crafting tables can use the resources directly. Next to your tent there is a tiny stockpile suitable for a tiny amount of resources.
Polish: Surowce takie jak kłody czy kamienie powinny znajdować się w składzie, aby były bezpośrednio wykorzystywane przez warsztaty. Obok twojego namiotu znajduje się mały składzik, który zmieści niewielką ilość surowców.
Dutch: Materials such as logs and stone are best placed into stockpiles so that crafting tables can use the resources directly. Next to your tent there is a tiny stockpile suitable for a tiny amount of resources.
Romanian: Materials such as logs and stone are best placed into stockpiles so that crafting tables can use the resources directly. Next to your tent there is a tiny stockpile suitable for a tiny amount of resources.
Danish: Materials such as logs and stone are best placed into stockpiles so that crafting tables can use the resources directly. Next to your tent there is a tiny stockpile suitable for a tiny amount of resources.
Czech: Materials such as logs and stone are best placed into stockpiles so that crafting tables can use the resources directly. Next to your tent there is a tiny stockpile suitable for a tiny amount of resources.
Swedish: Materials such as logs and stone are best placed into stockpiles so that crafting tables can use the resources directly. Next to your tent there is a tiny stockpile suitable for a tiny amount of resources.
Ukrainian: Матеріали, як-от колоди та камінь, найкраще розміщувати у коморах, щоби процеси створення могли безпосередньо використовувати ресурси. Поблизу вашого намету є крихітна комора, що годиться для крихітного запасу ресурсів.
Greek: Υλικά όπως κούτσουρα και πέτρα είναι καλύτερα να τοποθετούνται σε Περιοχές Αποθεμάτων έτσι ώστε να χρησιμοποιούνται απευθείας από τα τραπέζια κατασκευής. Δίπλα στην σκηνή σου υπάρχει μία μικροσκοπική Περιοχή Αποθεμάτων κατάλληλη για μικροσκοπικές ποσότητες πόρων.
Arabic: Materials such as logs and stone are best placed into stockpiles so that crafting tables can use the resources directly. Next to your tent there is a tiny stockpile suitable for a tiny amount of resources.
Vietnamese: Materials such as logs and stone are best placed into stockpiles so that crafting tables can use the resources directly. Next to your tent there is a tiny stockpile suitable for a tiny amount of resources.
Turkish: Kütük ve taş gibi kaynakların yerleştirilebileceği en iyi yer stoklardır böylece üretim masaları bu kaynakları doğrudan kullanabilir. Çadırının yanında az miktarda kaynak koymak için uygun küçük bir stok var.

English: Now that you have some materials, you can create your first work order. The tent has a very limited recipe list and crafting the workbench is the first step to creating your first real house.
French: Maintenant que vous avez du matériel, vous pouvez créer votre première commande de travail. La liste des recettes de la tente est très limitée et la fabrication de l'établi est la première étape pour créer votre première vraie résidence.
Spanish: Ahora que tienes algunos materiales, podrás crear tu primera orden de trabajo. La tienda tiene una lista muy limitada de recetas, por lo que crear la mesa de trabajo es el primer paso para tener una casa de verdad.
German: Nachdem du nun einige Materialien hast, kannst du deinen ersten Arbeitsauftrag erstellen. Das Zelt hat eine sehr begrenzte Rezeptliste und die Herstellung der Werkbank ist der erste Schritt zur Erstellung deines ersten echten Hauses.
Korean: 이제 약간의 재료가 생겼으므로 첫 번째 작업 주문을 생성할 수 있습니다. 텐트에 아주 간단한 제조법 목록이 있습니다. 첫 번째 집을 만들기 위한 첫 번째 단계는 작업대를 제작하는 것입니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: Agora que você tem alguns materiais, você pode criar sua primeira ordem de serviço. A tenda tem uma lista de receitas muito limitada, e criar a mesa de trabalho é o primeiro passo para fazer sua primeira casa de verdade.
SimplifedChinese: 你现已拥有一些材料，可创建首个工作订单。帐篷里有一个条目极少的配方清单，而制作工作台是建造首座真实房屋的第一步。
Russian: Теперь, когда у вас есть материалы, вы можете запустить свой первый проект. К сожалению в палатке вы можете создать очень мало вещей, так что изготовление верстака станет шагом к строительству вашего первого дома.
Italian: Ora che hai dei materiali, puoi creare il tuo primo ordine di lavoro di sempre. La tenda ha un elenco della ricetta molto limitato e fabbricare il banco di lavoro è il primo passo per creare la vostra prossima vera casa.
Portuguese: Now that you have some materials, you can create your first work order. The tent has a very limited recipe list and crafting the workbench is the first step to creating your first real house.
Hungarian: Now that you have some materials, you can create your first work order. The tent has a very limited recipe list and crafting the workbench is the first step to creating your first real house.
Japanese: 材料が少し集まったので、最初の作業オーダーを作成することができます。テントにあるレシピリストは非常に限られていますので、まず作業台を作るのが家を建てるための第一歩となります。
Norwegian: Now that you have some materials, you can create your first work order. The tent has a very limited recipe list and crafting the workbench is the first step to creating your first real house.
Polish: Teraz, kiedy masz już trochę surowców, możesz stworzyć swoje pierwsze zlecenie wykonania. Namiot ma bardzo ograniczoną listę przepisów, toteż stworzenie stołu warsztatowego będzie pierwszym krokiem na drodze do stworzenia twojego prawdziwego domu.
Dutch: Now that you have some materials, you can create your first work order. The tent has a very limited recipe list and crafting the workbench is the first step to creating your first real house.
Romanian: Now that you have some materials, you can create your first work order. The tent has a very limited recipe list and crafting the workbench is the first step to creating your first real house.
Danish: Now that you have some materials, you can create your first work order. The tent has a very limited recipe list and crafting the workbench is the first step to creating your first real house.
Czech: Now that you have some materials, you can create your first work order. The tent has a very limited recipe list and crafting the workbench is the first step to creating your first real house.
Swedish: Now that you have some materials, you can create your first work order. The tent has a very limited recipe list and crafting the workbench is the first step to creating your first real house.
Ukrainian: Тепер, як у вас є трохи матеріалів, можете створити перше робоче замовлення. В наметі замало рецептів, тому створення верстата буде першим кроком у будівництві справжнього будинку.
Greek: Τώρα που έχεις μερικά υλικά, μπορείς να βάλεις τη δουλειά σου σε μία σειρά. Η σκηνή σου έχει μία πολύ περιορισμένη λίστα συνταγών και η κατασκευή ενός πάγκου εργασίας είναι το πρώτο βήμα για να δημιουργήσεις το πρώτο σου αληθινό σπίτι.
Arabic: Now that you have some materials, you can create your first work order. The tent has a very limited recipe list and crafting the workbench is the first step to creating your first real house.
Vietnamese: Now that you have some materials, you can create your first work order. The tent has a very limited recipe list and crafting the workbench is the first step to creating your first real house.
Turkish: Artık elinizde materyaller olduğuna göre ilk çalışma düzeninizi oluşturabilirsiniz. Çadırın çok kısıtlı bir tarif listesi vardır ve ilk gerçek evinizi yapmak için çalışma tezgahı üretmek atacağınız ilk adım olmalıdır.

English: It might be a good idea to claim some extra land so you have more room to build your house.
French: Ce serait peut-être une bonne idée de revendiquer des parcelles supplémentaires pour avoir plus d'espace pour construire votre résidence.
Spanish: Podría ser una buena idea reclamar más terrenos y tener más espacio para construir tu casa.
German: Es könnte eine gute Idee sein, zusätzliches Land zu beanspruchen damit du mehr Platz hast, dein Haus zu bauen.
Korean: 집을 지을 수 있는 공간을 더 확보하도록 약간의 땅을 더 소유하는 것이 좋을 수 있습니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: Pode ser uma boa ideia reivindicar um terreno extra para que você tenha mais espaço para construir sua casa.
SimplifedChinese: 认领更多土地也许是个好主意，这样一来，你就有更多空间可用来建造房屋。
Russian: Хорошая идея - заполучить больше земли для строительства большего дома.
Italian: Potrebbe essere una buona idea rivendicare del terreno extra così da avere più spazio per costruire la tua casa.
Portuguese: It might be a good idea to claim some extra land so you have more room to build your house.
Hungarian: It might be a good idea to claim some extra land so you have more room to build your house.
Japanese: 家を建てるためのスペースを確保するために、もう少し土地を広めに確保しておいたほうがいいかもいしれません。
Norwegian: It might be a good idea to claim some extra land so you have more room to build your house.
Polish: Dobrym pomysłem mogłoby być przejęcie dodatkowych połaci terenu. Pozwoli to na więcej przestrzeni do zbudowania domu.
Dutch: It might be a good idea to claim some extra land so you have more room to build your house.
Romanian: It might be a good idea to claim some extra land so you have more room to build your house.
Danish: It might be a good idea to claim some extra land so you have more room to build your house.
Czech: It might be a good idea to claim some extra land so you have more room to build your house.
Swedish: It might be a good idea to claim some extra land so you have more room to build your house.
Ukrainian: Було б непогано загарбати собі у власність додаткової землі, щоби було більше простору для будівництва будинку.
Greek: Ίσως είναι μία καλή ιδέα να διεκδικήσεις λίγη παραπάνω γη έτσι ώστε να έχεις περισσότερο χώρο για να χτίσεις το σπίτι σου.
Arabic: It might be a good idea to claim some extra land so you have more room to build your house.
Vietnamese: It might be a good idea to claim some extra land so you have more room to build your house.
Turkish: Topraklarına fazladan arazi eklemek iyi bir fikir olabilir, böylelikle evini inşa etmek için daha fazla alana sahip olursun.

English: In order to construct a building, raw materials must be processed into a more usable form. For logs, this means hewing them at a workbench or carpenter's table.
French: Pour construire un bâtiment, les matières premières doivent être transformées sous une forme plus exploitable. Pour les bûches, cela signifie les tailler sur un établi classique ou un établi de menuiserie.
Spanish: Para construir un edificio, deberás procesar las materias primas y darles una forma más manejable. Para los troncos, eso significa que deberás tallarlos en una mesa de trabajo o en una mesa de carpintero.
German: Um ein Gebäude zu errichte, müssen Rohstoffe in eine besser nutzbare Form verarbeitet werden. Für Baumstämme bedeutet das, sie an einer Werkbank oder am Tischler-Tisch zu verarbeiten.
Korean: 건물을 건설하려면 원료를 더 유용한 형태로 가공해야 합니다. 통나무의 경우 작업대 또는 목공 작업대에서 자를 수 있습니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: Para construir um edifício, as matérias-primas devem ser processadas em uma forma mais utilizável. Para os troncos, isso significa cortá-los em uma bancada de trabalho ou em uma mesa de carpinteiro.
SimplifedChinese: 为了建造建筑物，原材料必须加工成更适合使用的形式。就原木而言，这意味着利用工作台或木工台将其砍成各种形状。
Russian: Для строительства дома, материалы должны быть обработаны. Например брёвна необходимо обтесать на верстаке или плотницком столе.
Italian: Per costruire un edificio, le materie prime devono esser trasformate in una forma più utilizzabile. Per i tronchi, questo significa scolpirli a un banco da lavoro o un banco da carpentiere.
Portuguese: In order to construct a building, raw materials must be processed into a more usable form. For logs, this means hewing them at a workbench or carpenter's table.
Hungarian: In order to construct a building, raw materials must be processed into a more usable form. For logs, this means hewing them at a workbench or carpenter's table.
Japanese: 建物を作るためには、資源を資材に変える必要があります。たとえば丸太の場合は、作業台か大工テーブルで加工することを意味します。
Norwegian: In order to construct a building, raw materials must be processed into a more usable form. For logs, this means hewing them at a workbench or carpenter's table.
Polish: Aby zbudować budynek, surowce muszą zostać przetworzone w bardziej użyteczną formę. W przypadku kłód oznacza to rąbanie ich na stole warsztatowym lub stolarskim.
Dutch: In order to construct a building, raw materials must be processed into a more usable form. For logs, this means hewing them at a workbench or carpenter's table.
Romanian: In order to construct a building, raw materials must be processed into a more usable form. For logs, this means hewing them at a workbench or carpenter's table.
Danish: In order to construct a building, raw materials must be processed into a more usable form. For logs, this means hewing them at a workbench or carpenter's table.
Czech: In order to construct a building, raw materials must be processed into a more usable form. For logs, this means hewing them at a workbench or carpenter's table.
Swedish: In order to construct a building, raw materials must be processed into a more usable form. For logs, this means hewing them at a workbench or carpenter's table.
Ukrainian: Для того, щоби побудувати будинок, сировина має бути перероблена в будівельні матеріали. Для колод це означає обтесування на верстаті чи теслярському столі.
Greek: Προκειμένου να φτιάξεις ένα κτήριο, τα ακατέργαστα υλικά πρέπει να επεξεργαστούν σε μία πιο χρήσιμη μορφή. Για τα κούτσουρα, αυτό σημαίνει ότι πρέπει να τα κόψεις στον σταθμό εργασίας ή σε ένα τραπέζι ξυλουργού.
Arabic: In order to construct a building, raw materials must be processed into a more usable form. For logs, this means hewing them at a workbench or carpenter's table.
Vietnamese: In order to construct a building, raw materials must be processed into a more usable form. For logs, this means hewing them at a workbench or carpenter's table.
Turkish: Bir bina dikmek için, ham maddelerin işlenebilir durumda olması gerekir. Örnek olarak, odunların işlenmesi için, bir çalışma tezgâhında yahut marangoz masasında yontulması gerekir.

English: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
French: Récupérez au moins 4 rondins taillés en main.  Fabriquez-en plus si nécessaire.
Spanish: Consigue, por lo menos, 4 troncos tallados (prepara más si es necesario)
German: Sammle mindestens 4 Holz in der Hand. Stelle weitere her, falls nötig.
Korean: 적어도 4개 이상의 잘라낸 통나무를 모으세요. 필요하면 더 만드세요.
BrazillianPortuguese: Colete pelo menos 4 toras cortadas nas mãos. Faça mais, se necessário.
SimplifedChinese: 手上应收集至少 4 根粗凿原木。如有需要，则制作更多。
Russian: Возьмите в руки хотя бы 4 тёсаных бревна. Произведите больше, если нужно.
Italian: Raccogli almeno 4 tronchi scolpiti in mano.  Creane altri se necessario.
Portuguese: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
Hungarian: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
Japanese: 少なくとも 4 つ以上の丸太材を集めてください、必要ならそれ以上作っても良いでしょう。
Norwegian: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
Polish: Zbierz co najmniej 4 ociosane kłody w ręku. W razie potrzeby zrób więcej.
Dutch: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
Romanian: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
Danish: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
Czech: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
Swedish: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
Ukrainian: Обтешіть щонайменше 4 колоди. За необхідності зробіть ще.
Greek: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
Arabic: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
Vietnamese: Collect at least 4 hewn logs in hand.  Make more if needed.
Turkish: En az 4 tane, eğer gerekirse daha da fazla yontulmuş odun topla.

English: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
French: Lorsque vous planifiez votre colonie, vous voudrez commencer à transformer le terrain. Utilisez une pelle pour déplacer la terre.
Spanish: Conforme diseñes tu asentamiento querrás comenzar a transformar la superficie. Usa una pala para mover tierra.
German: Während du deine Siedlung entwirfst, wirst du mit damit beginnen wollen, das Land anzupassen. Nutze eine Schaufel um die Erde zu bewegen.
Korean: 정착지를 형성하는 동안 땅을 변형해야 할 수 있습니다. 삽을 사용해서 흙을 옮기세요.
BrazillianPortuguese: À medida que você planeja seu assentamento, você pode começar a transformar o terreno. Use uma pá para mover a terra.
SimplifedChinese: 布置定居点时，你会想要改变地形。使用铲子移走泥土。
Russian: Когда вы наметите место своего поселения, вам может понадобиться внести изменения в окружающий ландшафт.  Используйте лопату для переноса почвы.
Italian: Come definisci il tuo insediamento, vorrai iniziare a trasformare il terreno.  Usa una pala per spostare la terra.
Portuguese: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
Hungarian: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
Japanese: 開拓地のレイアウトを計画していくと、地形を変形させる必要が出てきます。シャベルを使って土を移動しましょう。
Norwegian: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
Polish: Podczas planowania swojej posiadłości, pomyśl o przekształceniu terenu. Użyj Łopaty aby przenosić ziemię.
Dutch: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
Romanian: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
Danish: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
Czech: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
Swedish: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
Ukrainian: Після розмітки майбутнього поселення слід підготувати землю для нього. Використовуйте лопату для переміщення землі.
Greek: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
Arabic: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
Vietnamese: As you layout your settlement, you'll want to be begin transforming the land.  Use a shovel to move dirt.
Turkish: Yerleşim bölgeni kurduğun süre boyunca, bulunduğun bölgeyi değiştirmek de isteyeceksin. Zemini kazmak için kürek kullan.

English: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
French: Le transport des pierres nécessite deux étapes : les briser en petits morceaux à l'aide d'une pioche, puis les ramasser.
Spanish: Para mover rocas, sigue estos dos pasos: rómpelas en trozos más pequeños con un pico, y luego recógelas y transpórtalas.
German: Um Steine zu bewegen, sind zwei Schritte erforderlich: Zerkleinere die Steine mit einer Spitzhacke und hebe die Stücke dann auf.
Korean: 바위를 옮기려면 두 단계를 거쳐야 합니다. 먼저, 곡괭이를 사용하여 작은 조각들로 부순 다음, 그 조각들을 담습니다.
BrazillianPortuguese: Mover pedras exige dois passos: quebrá-las em pedaços menores com uma picareta, e depois pegá-los.
SimplifedChinese: 需要两个步骤方可移动岩石：利用镐将岩石打成小石块，然后捡起小石块。
Russian: Перемещение камней состоит из двух шагов: раскалывание на более мелкие части с помощью кирки и последующий их сбор.
Italian: Spostare le rocce richiede due momenti: romperle in pezzi più piccoli con un piccone, poi raccogliere i pezzi.
Portuguese: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
Hungarian: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
Japanese: 岩を動かすには次の 2 つの段階を踏む必要があります: まずツルハシで岩を小さく砕いてから、石の破片を拾わなければなりません。
Norwegian: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
Polish: Luźne kamienie wymagają dwóch etapów: rozbicia ich kilofem na mniejsze kawałki a potem zebranie ich.
Dutch: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
Romanian: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
Danish: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
Czech: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
Swedish: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
Ukrainian: Для усунення каменів потрібно: розбити їх на менші шматки кайлом, а потім підібрати ті шматки.
Greek: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
Arabic: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
Vietnamese: Moving rocks requires two-steps: breaking them into smaller pieces with a pickaxe, then picking up the pieces.
Turkish: Taş taşımak iki adımdan oluşur: ilk önce bir kazma ile ufak parçalara ayırırsın, sonra o parçaları tek tek alırsın.

English: Get started with eating a balanced diet.
BrazillianPortuguese: Comece comendo comidas variadas para equilibrar sua dieta.
SimplifedChinese: 开始享用均衡饮食的乐趣吧。
Italian: Inizia a mangiare una dieta bilanciata.
Portuguese: Get started with eating a balanced diet.
Hungarian: Get started with eating a balanced diet.
Japanese: まずは、栄養バランスの良い食事をとっていきましょう。
Norwegian: Get started with eating a balanced diet.
Dutch: Begin met het eten van een gebalanceerd dieet.
Romanian: Get started with eating a balanced diet.
Danish: Get started with eating a balanced diet.
Czech: Get started with eating a balanced diet.
Swedish: Get started with eating a balanced diet.
Greek: Get started with eating a balanced diet.
Arabic: Get started with eating a balanced diet.
Vietnamese: Get started with eating a balanced diet.

English: You've run completely out of calories, which is going to make it hard to keep working.  Fortunately, you always have enough energy to find food in the forest.\n\nFind these plants in the forest, and click 'E' to collect them.
French: Vous n'avez plus du tout de calories, ce qui va vous empêcher de continuer à travailler.  Heureusement, vous avez toujours assez d'énergie pour trouver de la nourriture dans la forêt.\n\nTrouvez ces plantes dans la forêt, et appuyez sur 'E' pour les collecter.
Spanish: Has consumido completamente todas tus calorías lo que hará realmente difícil seguir trabajando. Por suerte siempre tienes suficiente energía para encontrar comida en el bosque.\n\nEncuentra estas plantas en el bosque y pulsa "E" para cosecharlas.
German: Du hast keine Kalorien mehr, was die Arbeit erschwert. Glücklicherweise hast du immer genug Energie, um Nahrung im Wald zu finden.\n\nSuche Pflanzen im Wald und drücke auf 'E', um diese zu sammeln.
Korean: 칼로리를 완전히 사용해서 일을 계속하기가 힘들어졌습니다. 다행히 숲 속에서 음식을 찾을 수 있는 에너지는 언제나 충분합니다.\n\n숲 속에서 이 식물들을 찾은 후 'E'를 클릭해서 수집하세요.
BrazillianPortuguese: Você esgotou completamente suas calorias, que o dificultará em continuar trabalhando. Felizmente, você sempre tem energia suficiente para encontrar comida na floresta.\n\nEncontre essas plantas na floresta e clique em 'E' para coletá-las.
SimplifedChinese: 你已耗尽热量，这将为继续工作带来困难。幸运的是，你总能保持充足精力，前往森林寻找食物。\n\n在森林里找到这些植物，并按‘E’键将其收集。
Russian: Вы сильно проголодались и не можете работать.  К счастью у вас всегда есть достаточно энергии что бы найти еду в лесу.\n\nНайдите растения в лесу и нажмите 'E' что бы собрать их.
Italian: Hai consumato completamente le calorie, il che renderà dura continuare a lavorare. Fortunatamente, hai sempre abbastanza energia per cercare cibo nella foresta.\n\nTrova queste piante nella foresta, e clicca 'E' per raccoglierle.

English:
Stopping the meteor will require a thriving economy of specialists, using resources efficiently.

Choose roles you would like to specialize in, and later you may trade the fruits of your labor with your fellow citizens.
French:
Arrêter le météore exigera une économie florissante de spécialistes, utilisant les ressources efficacement.

Choisissez les rôles dans lesquels vous aimeriez vous spécialiser, et plus tard vous pourrez échanger les fruits de votre travail avec vos concitoyens.
Spanish:
Para detener el meteorito, se necesita una economía próspera y con especialistas que usen sus recursos de manera eficiente.

Elige los roles en los que te gustaría especializarte. Luego podrás intercambiar los frutos de tu trabajo especializado con otros ciudadanos.
German:
Das Stoppen des Meteors erfordert eine florierende Wirtschaft mit Spezialisten, die die Ressourcen effizient nutzen.

Wähle Rollen, in denen du dich spezialisieren möchtest und später wirst du die Früchte deiner Arbeit mit deinen Mitbürgern handeln können.
Korean:
운석을 막으려면 다양한 전문가들로 구성된 번성한 경제를 구축하고, 자원을 효율적으로 사용해야 합니다.

전문으로 하고 싶은 역할을 선택하세요. 나중에 자신이 작업한 생산물을 가지고 동료 시민들과 거래하게 될 겁니다.
BrazillianPortuguese:
Parar o meteoro exigirá uma economia próspera de especialistas, usando recursos de forma eficiente.

Escolha as funções nas quais gostaria de se especializar e, posteriormente, poderá negociar os frutos de seu trabalho com seus concidadãos.
SimplifedChinese:
要阻止流星，将需要各个专业领域在经济上实现繁荣发展，并能有效利用资源。

选择你要专攻的角色，稍后即可用劳动果实与其他公民们交换。
Russian:
Что бы остановить астероид потребуется процветающая экономика с эффективным использованием ресурсов.

Выберите свою роль, в которой вы желаете специализироваться, и позднее сможете продавать плоды своих усилий другим.
Italian:
Fermare la meteora richiederà un'economia fiorente di specialisti, usando le risorse efficientemente.

Scegli i ruoli in cui vorresti specializzarti e poi potrai commerciare i frutti del tuo lavoro con i tuoi concittadini.

English: Waste product from smelting.  When left on soil the run-off will create pollution; killing nearby plants and seeping into the water supply.  Contain in buildings or bury in rock to neutralize.
French: Déchets provenant de la fusion.  Lorsqu'ils sont laissés sur le sol, le ruissellement crée de la pollution, tuant les plantes voisines et s'infiltrant dans les nappes phréatiques.  Stocker les dans des bâtiments ou enterrer les dans la roche pour les neutraliser.
Spanish: Residuo producido en fundiciones. Al dejarse en el terreno, la escorrentía creará polución; esto matará plantas cercanas y se filtrará en fuentes de agua. Debe contenerse en edificios o enterrarse en roca para ser neutralizado.
German: Abfallprodukt, das beim Schmelzen erzeugt wird. Wenn es auf Erde liegen gelassen wird erzeugen die Ausspülungen Verschmutzung, die nahe Pflanzen abtötet und in die Wasserversorgung sickert. Zum Neutralisieren tief unter der Erde vergraben.
Korean: 제련 과정에서 나온 폐기물입니다. 토양에 방치할 경우 오염 물질이 유출되어 주변의 식물들에 피해를 입히고 상수원으로 스며듭니다. 건물 안에 격리시키거나 암석 안에 매립해서 중화시키세요.
BrazillianPortuguese: Produto residual da fundição. Quando deixado no solo, o escoamento criará poluição; matando plantas próximas e infiltrando-se no suprimento de água. Conter em prédios ou enterrar na rocha para neutralizar.
SimplifedChinese: 冶炼产生的废品。若将其留在土壤中，径流会产生污染，摧毁周围植物并渗入水源。将其存放在建筑物内或埋入岩石，以实现中和效果。
Russian: Отходы плавки.  Лёжа на земле создаёт загрязнение, убивающее растения неподалёку и отравляющее источники воды.  Храните в зданиях или глубоко в скале для нейтрализации.
Italian: Prodotto di scarto della fusione. Quando lasciato sul suolo, il deflusso creerà inquinamento; uccidendo le piante nelle vicinanze e filtrando nella rete idrica.  Contenere in edifici o seppellire nella roccia per neutralizzarlo.
Portuguese: Waste product from smelting.  When left on soil the run-off will create pollution; killing nearby plants and seeping into the water supply.  Contain in buildings or bury in rock to neutralize.

Japanese: 精錬によって廃棄物が生成されます。土壌に放置すると汚染が流出し、近くの植物を枯らし水域に公害をもたらします。汚染を中和するには、岩に埋めるか建物で囲んでください。
Norwegian: Waste product from smelting.  When left on soil the run-off will create pollution; killing nearby plants and seeping into the water supply.  Contain in buildings or bury in rock to neutralize.
Polish: Odpad z wytopu. Pozostawiony na glebie spływ spowoduje zanieczyszczenie; zabijając pobliskie rośliny i może się przedostać do wody. Przechowywać w budynkach lub zakopać w skale, aby zneutralizować.

English: Players can give or take up to 10 reputation per day, and each day it replenishes up to 10.\n\nReputation allows you to see how a player has interacted with others in the world, using that information to make decisions.
French: Les joueurs peuvent donner ou recevoir jusqu'à 10 points de réputation par jour.\n\nLa réputation vous permet de voir comment un joueur a interagi avec d'autres joueurs dans le monde, et permet de vous aider à prendre des décisions.
Spanish: Los jugadores pueden dar o recibir hasta 10 de reputación por día, y cada día se repone hasta 10. \n\nLa reputación te permite ver cómo un jugador ha interactuado con otros en el mundo, usando esa información para tomar decisiones.
German: Spieler können bis zu 10 positive oder negative Reputationspunkte am Tag vergeben und an jedem neuem Tag werden diese wieder auf 10 aufgefüllt.\n\nReputation zeigt an, wie ein Spieler mit anderen Spielern in der Welt interagiert hat. Verwende diese Informationen, um Entscheidungen zu treffen.
Korean: 플레이어들은 하루에 최대 10개의 명성을 수여하거나 획득할 수 있으며, 매일 최대 10개가 새로 보충됩니다.\n\n명성을 통해서 어떤 플레이어가 세계에서 다른 플레이어들과 어떻게 교류하고 있는지 파악할 수 있으며, 각종 결정을 내리는 데 이 정보를 참고할 수 있습니다.
